experience.title: Production Manager
responsibilities: Managed multiple live theater productions from inception to completion, ensuring all elements were executed smoothly.
Coordinated with cross-functional teams including directors, actors, and stage crew to deliver high-quality performances.
Oversaw budget allocations for productions, negotiating costs with vendors to keep projects within financial constraints.
Facilitated communication between departments to enhance collaboration and resolve conflicts during production timelines.

experience.title: Event Coordinator
responsibilities: Planned and executed various art events, managing logistics, budgeting, and vendor contracts.
Developed promotional materials and managed social media campaigns to increase event attendance.
Collaborated with artists and sponsors to curate engaging experiences at art exhibitions.

response.summary: Dynamic production manager with over 7 years of experience in the arts industry. Proven track record in project management, team collaboration, and budgeting, seeking to leverage creative problem-solving skills in a new environment.
